kinktober, day nine: tentacles

Kaiyo's your boyfriend. He really loves you, okay? But he has eight brains afterall-- he's smart! So he's busy... but he also had three hearts, so he feels all guilty...

And now, he wants to fuck you, but is busy again. So, he offers you his tentacles... please, please, take them!
